title: Venuscello® Rubble Sacks Heavy Duty | Clear Refuse Builders Bags 36 in x 48 in 250 Gauge Strong and Tear-Resistant - Ideal for Builders, Contractors, Renovation and Garden Waste (10 PC)
features: Ultimate Strength and Durability: Our rubble sacks are engineered with premium-grade materials, ensuring unrivaled strength and durability to withstand heavy construction debris.
Heavy-Duty Performance: Designed for the toughest jobs, these sacks can handle the weight and sharp edges of bricks, concrete, tiles, and other construction materials without tearing or puncturing.
Heavy-Duty Construction: Made from sturdy materials, these sacks can handle the weight and sharp edges of various construction debris without easily tearing or puncturing.
Generous Size: With their 36" x 48" dimensions, these rubble sacks provide ample space to collect and contain a significant amount of debris, reducing the need for frequent bag changes.
Versatile Applications: Suitable for construction sites, renovations, gardening, and DIY projects, these rubble sacks are versatile and can handle a wide range of debris types.
Convenient and Time-Saving: Save valuable time and effort with our rubble sacks that make debris cleanup a breeze, allowing you to focus on your project instead of worrying about bag integrity.
description: Product Description Introducing our Clear Rubble Sacks Transparent Visibility: Our Clear Rubble Sacks are designed with transparency in mind. The clear polyethylene material allows you to easily see the contents of the sack, making it convenient for sorting and identifying different types of waste during construction, renovation, or general cleanup projects. Heavy-Duty Strength: Our Clear Rubble Sacks are constructed with a heavy-duty, tear-resistant material that can withstand the rigors of demanding tasks. Whether you're dealing with sharp objects, heavy debris, or bulky waste, these sacks provide exceptional strength and durability, ensuring that they won't easily tear or puncture. Generous Capacity: Each sack offers a generous capacity to accommodate large amounts of waste. With ample space available, you can efficiently collect and dispose of debris without the need for frequent bag changes, saving you time and effort during cleanup. Reliable Closure: Our clear rubble sacks feature a secure closure mechanism, such as a tie string or zip-tie, to ensure that the contents remain safely contained. This prevents any spills, leaks, or odors from escaping during transportation or storage, maintaining a clean and hygienic environment. Versatile Applications: Our clear rubble sacks are not limited to construction or renovation projects. They are versatile enough to be used in various settings, such as gardening, landscaping, or even for storage purposes. The transparent design also makes them suitable for organizing and storing items while keeping them visible and easily accessible . Atmosphere Friendly :- Our clear rubble sacks are made from recyclable materials , making them an atmosphere-friendly choice. By opting for our sacks, you contribute to reducing plastic waste and promoting sustainability, without compromising on quality or functionality. Easy Handling :- Each sack is designed with user convenience in mind. They are lightweight and easy to handle, allowing for hassle-free loading , lifting, and transport. The durable construction ensures that the sacks maintain their integrity, even when filled with heavy or sharp objects. Enhanced Safety :- Our Clear Rubble Sacks are designed with safety in mind . The transparent material allows for easy identification of potentially hazardous waste, such as broken glass or sharp objects, minimizing the risk of accidental injuries during handling and disposal. Perfect for Construction and DIY Projects :- Our Clear Rubble Sacks are specifically designed to meet the demands of construction and DIY projects. From collecting and disposing of debris, such as broken tiles, plaster, or wood, to organizing and transporting materials, these sacks are the ideal companion for any construction or renovation task. Convenient Size :- Our clear rubble sacks are available in a convenient size that strikes a balance between capacity and manageability. They are large enough to hold a significant amount of waste, yet compact and lightweight for easy handling and storage when not in use.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Construction Waste, Garden Waste, Yard Waste
